Add Custom Client
💡 Quick Setup: Upload an Excel file with your client info to auto-fill the form below. Or fill in manually. Expected columns: Bill To Name, Bill To Address 1, Bill To Address 2, Bill To Country, Ship To Name, Ship To Address 1, Ship To Address 2, Ship To Country, Payment Terms, Attention, Item Code, NF Item, Price
If checked, client will have both Invoice + CI. Uses ZQ factory format. If unchecked, uses HK office format with Bill To + Ship To on Invoice.

📊 Cashflow Forecast
📂 PO Forecast — Import from PO
🔑 Optional: OpenAI API Key (improves recognition accuracy for complex PO formats)
Without API Key: uses built-in local rule engine (free, works offline). With API Key: uses AI for better accuracy on complex formats. Key is stored locally only.

📄 PDF Import: Upload any customer PO PDF → auto-extracts PO#, Shipment Date, Amount (no API key needed) → confirm & adjust in popup → saved as forecast.
✏️ Manual Input: Manually enter PO details (PO#, Client, Ship Date, Items, Amount) → saved as forecast.
📂 Excel Upload: Batch upload shipment schedule. Expected columns: PO#, Client, Ship Date, Amount (USD)

✏️ New PO — Manual Input Manually enter PO details and save to forecast
